name: Deborah
description: Deborah was a prophetess, judge, and military leader in ancient Israel, celebrated for her wisdom, courage, and divinely inspired leadership. As the fourth judge of pre-monarchic Israel, she held court under the Palm of Deborah between Ramah and Bethel in the hill country of Ephraim, resolving disputes and offering guidance to the people. Her most significant achievement was inspiring and orchestrating the victory of the Israelites against the Canaanite army led by Sisera. When Barak, the son of Abinoam, hesitated to lead the Israelite army without her, Deborah agreed to accompany him, prophesying that the honor of Sisera's defeat would go to a woman. The ensuing battle, recounted in the Book of Judges, resulted in a decisive Israelite victory, with Sisera being killed by Jael. Deborah's leadership and the subsequent period of peace that followed solidified her place as a pivotal figure in Jewish history, symbolizing female strength, strategic brilliance, and unwavering faith in God.
subtitle: Prophetess, Judge, and Military Leader
achievements: Serving as a Judge of Israel
Inspiring Barak to lead the army
Leading Israel to victory against the Canaanites
Ushering in a period of 40 years of peace

keyMyths.title: Deborah's Prophecy
keyMyths.description: Deborah prophesied that Barak would defeat Sisera but that the glory would go to a woman. This prophecy came true when Jael killed Sisera with a tent peg.

keyMyths.title: The Song of Deborah
keyMyths.description: Following the victory, Deborah and Barak composed a song of praise to God. This song celebrates the courage and dedication of the Israelite warriors and the humiliation of their enemies.

keyMyths.title: Judging Under the Palm
keyMyths.description: Deborah held court under the Palm of Deborah, dispensing justice and guidance. This demonstrates her role as a respected leader and arbiter of disputes.

sources.author: The Hebrew Bible
sources.description: The primary source for the story of Deborah.
sources.text: The primary source for the story of Deborah.

sources.author: Carol Meyers
sources.work: Discovering Eve: Ancient Israelite Women in Context
sources.description: Provides scholarly analysis of Deborah's role and significance in ancient Israel.
sources.text: Provides scholarly analysis of Deborah's role and significance in ancient Israel.
